title: Implement ferrum-stride-tricks: sliding_window_view, as_strided, overlap checking

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Delivered: ferrum-stride-tricks fully implemented — sliding_window_view (zero-copy), as_strided (safe with overlap validation), as_strided_unchecked (unsafe with Safety docs), broadcast_to/broadcast_arrays/broadcast_shapes (delegating to ferrum-core). Added from_shape_ptr escape hatch to ferrum-core ArrayView. 56 tests passing, clippy clean.
